svg.title: dbFlow — architecture and data flow
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture from DB proprietary data sources through LLM intelligence layer to external client monetization

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What FX flow data does Deutsche Bank have and why is it valuable for AI?')
sendPrompt('What trade finance data does Deutsche Bank Corporate Bank hold?')
sendPrompt('What is prime brokerage flow data and what insights can it yield?')
sendPrompt('What is correspondent banking data and how does it differ from other flow data?')

g.text: Apache Iceberg + Trino + Nessie + Airflow on GKE

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Apache Iceberg time-travel work for financial flow data versioning?')
sendPrompt('How does Trino federated query work across multiple data sources for real-time analytics?')
sendPrompt('How does Nessie catalog version control work for financial datasets?')
sendPrompt('How can Airflow DAGs orchestrate real-time financial data pipelines for LLM feature stores?')

g.text: Fine-tuned on DB flow data + RAG over institutional knowledge base

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How would you fine-tune an LLM on institutional FX and flow data — what training approach works best?')
sendPrompt('How does RAG over financial documents work — what chunking and embedding strategy works for flow data?')
sendPrompt('How would anomaly detection on FX flows work — what ML approach detects unusual positioning?')
sendPrompt('How would a natural language query interface over institutional flow data work in practice?')
sendPrompt('How would a REST plus WebSocket API be designed for real-time financial flow intelligence delivery?')

g.text: Layer 5 — Revenue model and client segments

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How would Deutsche Bank price a data subscription product for hedge funds — what benchmarks exist?')
sendPrompt('What flow intelligence would Sovereign Wealth Funds want from Deutsche Bank data?')
sendPrompt('How would a corporate treasury use FX flow intelligence from Deutsche Bank for hedging decisions?')
sendPrompt('What is the API licensing model for financial data products — how does Bloomberg Terminal pricing compare?')
